summary: Iteration 79 - Testing Site Settings, Staff Login Methods, CRM Dashboard Tabs, and WhatsApp API Modal. Backend APIs all working. Frontend has one UI bug in Staff Login page.

ui_bugs.issue: Duplicate form fields on Email + Password tab - shows 2 email inputs, 2 password inputs, 2 login buttons. Caused by duplicate conditional render block at lines 792 and 1100

action_items: FIX: Remove duplicate email_password form block in StaffLogin.js (lines 1099-1146) - this is causing duplicate form fields
critical_code_review_comments: StaffLogin.js has duplicate conditional render for loginMethod === 'email_password' at lines 792 and 1100, causing duplicate form fields
test_credentials: Admin auth via localStorage: asrAdminAuth=true, asrAdminEmail=asrenterprisespatna@gmail.com. Fallback OTP: 131993
context_for_next_testing_agent: All requested features verified working: 1) GET/POST /api/site-settings - marquee API working correctly. 2) CRM Dashboard tabs - 'New' and 'WhatsApp Inquiries' tabs removed, 'Site Settings' tab added with marquee editor (text field, toggle, save button, quick templates, live preview). 3) Staff Login page has 3 login method tabs (Email+Password, Mobile OTP, Email+2FA) but has duplicate form fields bug. 4) WhatsApp button in Leads Management opens API modal instead of wa.me link. 5) Homepage marquee fetches text from backend API.

backend: POST /api/site-settings - saves marquee settings and persists
frontend: Homepage marquee displays text from API
Staff Login page has 3 login method tabs
CRM Dashboard tabs - 'WhatsApp Inquiries' tab removed
CRM Dashboard tabs - 'Site Settings' tab present
Site Settings tab - Marquee Header section present
Site Settings tab - Marquee text textarea present
Site Settings tab - Enabled toggle present
Site Settings tab - Save Marquee Settings button present
Site Settings tab - Quick Templates present
Site Settings tab - Live Preview present
Leads Management - WhatsApp button opens API modal
WhatsApp modal - Shows lead info, template selection, custom message, Send via API button

features_verified.site_settings_api: WORKING - GET/POST /api/site-settings returns and saves marquee_text, marquee_enabled
features_verified.crm_tabs_removed: WORKING - 'New' and 'WhatsApp Inquiries' tabs removed from CRM Dashboard
features_verified.site_settings_tab: WORKING - New tab with marquee editor (text, toggle, save, templates, preview)
features_verified.staff_login_tabs: PARTIAL - 3 tabs present but duplicate form fields bug on Email+Password tab
features_verified.whatsapp_api_modal: WORKING - Opens modal with template selection and Send via API button

rca_of_the_issue: Staff Login duplicate form fields: The StaffLogin.js file has two identical conditional render blocks for loginMethod === 'email_password' at lines 792-848 and 1099-1146. Both blocks render when the Email+Password tab is selected, causing duplicate form fields. Fix: Remove the second block (lines 1099-1146).
